who: accounting firms managing 10–20 travel expense reports/month
offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual approvals cause late reimbursements. We streamline approvals instead of manual spreadsheets and email approvals.
problem: Manual processing of travel expenses leads to delays in reimbursements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users explore expense report templates and dashboards on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing expenses
Simplify onboarding steps for new users
